title: Pentagon considers diverting Ukraine military aid to the Middle East
summary_full: A shift would highlight the growing trade-offs required for the U.S. to sustain its war with Iran as the conflict depletes the military’s critical munitions.
summary_public: A shift would highlight the growing trade-offs required for the U.S. to sustain its war with Iran as the conflict depletes the military’s critical munitions.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: conflict depletes the military’s critical munitions.
